description: CompositionBlue strappy dotted dress made of 100% cotton, has two pockets on the sides with a satin bow detail, full buttoned placket with flower shaped buttons, pin-tucks from the chest to the hem and a ruffled hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycleDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or lay flat to dryMedium heat steam iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry in sunlightCatching butterflies in summer - that's what this frock from doodle is perfect for! Crafted with pure absorbent cotton (for her comfort), pretty ruffling at the hem and too-sweet flower shaped buttons, this piece is perfect for a spring fete or an evening stroll in the park.
